title: LED Candle, Battery Operated with Timer, Pillar Flickering Flameless, Ivory, Acrylic, Remote Control, 7.5 x 10cm
features: 【Incredibly Realistic Dancing Flame】Experience the mesmerizing charm of our LED pillar candles with their incredibly lifelike dancing flame, adding a touch of magic to any space.
【Safe and Worry-Free】With flame simulation technology and LED light source, our flameless candles are safe to use around children and pets, eliminating the risk of fire-related accidents.

【Convenient Remote Control】 The 10-key remote control allows you to set a specific time for a candle to come on automatically each day and it will remain lit for a predetermined duration of either 2 hours, 4 hours, 6 hours, or 8 hours before automatically turning off. Creating a cozy and ambient atmosphere effortlessly.

【Versatile Decoration】These moving wick candles are perfect for various occasions, including birthdays, Christmas, weddings, festival, parties, or simply enhancing the atmosphere at home, bars, and hotels.

【Battery Operated Candles】The real wax moving flame candle is powered by 2 AA batteries (not included) with a flickering effect, lasting over 300 hours. Batteries can be easily replaced via the tab at the bottom.
description: Lerelin Battery Candles, Led Candles Battery Operated With Timer, Pillar Flickering Flameless Candles With Remote Control For Household, Halloween, Christmas Gifts 7.5 X 10Cm
